entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Primary sector of the Indian economy crucial for ensuring food, nutrition, and livelihood security

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country facing agricultural challenges and high vulnerability to climate change

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food, threatened by climate change

entities.name: FOOD GRAINS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The output of food grains in India, which achieved self-sufficiency through the Green Revolution

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of agricultural transformation that led to self-sufficiency in food grains production in India

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to support plant growth, which is currently facing loss in India

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: A condition where soil is saturated with water, posing a challenge to Indian agriculture

entities.name: WATER POLLUTION
entities.description: Contamination of ground and surface water sources in India

entities.name: PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: Biological threats to crops that have intensified in the Indian agricultural context

entities.name: FARM INPUT PRICES
entities.description: The costs associated with agricultural inputs, which have increased in India

entities.name: REGIONAL DISPARITY
entities.description: The uneven distribution of agricultural resources and development across different regions of India

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in global weather patterns that pose a significant threat to Indian agriculture and food security

entities.name: FAMINES
entities.description: Extreme food scarcity that may affect millions of Indians due to reduced productivity and supply chain disruptions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, which is threatened by climate change

entities.name: FOOD SUPPLY CHAIN
entities.description: The system of moving food from production to consumption, susceptible to disruption by climate change

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The increase in Earth's average surface temperature, evidenced by India's warmest decade from 2010 to 2019

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The integrated components of farming that face heightened uncertainty due to climate variability
